skill_execution.question: Who set the fastest lap in qualifying?

sql:
SELECT
    pdnm.full_name,
    FORMAT("%02d:%02d.%03d",
        CAST(FLOOR(pl.lap_time_ms / 60000) AS INT64),
        CAST(FLOOR(MOD(pl.lap_time_ms, 60000) / 1000) AS INT64),
        CAST(MOD(pl.lap_time_ms, 1000) AS INT64)
    ) AS fastest_lap_time,
    pr.race_name,
    pse.year
FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.public_laps AS pl
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_sessions AS ps
    ON pl.session_id = ps.session_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_races AS pr
    ON ps.race_id = pr.race_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_seasons AS pse
    ON pr.season_id = pse.season_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_drivers AS pd
    ON pl.driver_id = pd.driver_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_driver_number_mapping AS pdnm
    ON TRIM(CAST(pd.driver_code AS STRING)) = pdnm.driver_code AND pdnm.season = pse.year
WHERE
    ps.session_type = 'Q'
    AND pse.year = 2024
ORDER BY
    pr.race_date DESC,
    pl.lap_time_ms ASC
LIMIT 1
